evidence_summary: Focused package build graph, discovery, interface, public-surface, and backend-preparation tests passed; git diff --check passed; cabal build all && cabal test passed with 2461 examples; the diff implements private deterministic local package roots, search paths, build graph metadata, and cache validation policy.
